conversations.speaker: Deacon Mealy
lines: Another stray off the boat? The Bethel sees everything.
Package is at the pier. The contact owes the Republic money — collect or crack skulls, your call.
Take a car if you have to. Heat stays low if you are quick.

conversations.speaker: Pier Contact
lines: You Mealy's new errand dog? Figures.
Package is in the trunk. Republic boys already sniffing around.
Do not die on my planks — paperwork is a nightmare.

conversations.speaker: Republic Runner
lines: Linguica does not deliver itself. Off the Hook still owes us two favors.
Drive it downtown. Smile for the cameras you cannot see.
